headline: Turkey take the biscuit as Max keeps the lid on the lot
text: Turkey (Chris) edged USA (Vicki) 3-2, so Chris takes the cheers and Vicki takes the bruises. Elsewhere it was all rather civilised: Paraguay (Max) v Australia (Nana) finished 0-0, and Japan (Alex) v Sweden (Emily) also shared the points. No big wobbles for the leaders, but Max stays top overall on 18 points, with Rosaria next on 16. At the other end, Sofia is still propping up the table on 4 points, a fair way adrift of the pack.
